description_long: This is a wall-mounted stone fountain featuring a prominent sculpted lion or mythological face as its central ornament. The face is framed by an ornate, arched border with classical detailing, and water would typically flow from the mouth into a semi-circular stone basin below. The basin is robust and projects outward from the wall, with a rounded rim and a slightly textured surface. The fountain is set against a backdrop of weathered stone blocks, giving it an aged, historical appearance. The overall design is reminiscent of European or Mediterranean public fountains, often found in plazas or courtyards. The structure appears solid and heavy, with intricate decorative elements that enhance its visual appeal.
description: A wall-mounted stone fountain with an ornate sculpted face and a semi-circular basin, set against weathered stone blocks. The design is classical and richly detailed.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the sculpted face, ornate border, and the full semi-circular basin projecting from the wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the basin and the thinness of the wall structure, with the face and border visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the fountain and the stone wall, with the basin and face less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the basin's projection and the relief of the decorative face.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain features a sculpted face with detailed hair and beard, framed by an ornate arched border with classical motifs. The border includes scrollwork and relief patterns, adding to the decorative richness.
attribute_basin_structure: The basin is semi-circular, robust, and projects outward with a rounded rim. It is a single-tiered structure with no visible compartments or divisions.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: No visible water jets or spray patterns are present; water would typically flow from the mouth of the sculpted face into the basin below.
